When set to true, it ensures that data stored in the object cannot be updated (only object metadata can be modified).\n- **`staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go`**: Public API type definitions (v1 package) with the same `Immutable *bool` field for both `Secret` and `ConfigMap`.\n\n## 2. Immutable Field Validation and Mutation Prevention\n\n- **`pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go`**: Contains the core validation logic:\n  - `ValidateSecretUpdate(newSecret, oldSecret *core.Secret)`: Checks if the old secret was immutable; if so, prevents changing `immutable` back to false and prevents changing `data`.\n  - `ValidateConfigMapUpdate(newCfg, oldCfg *core.ConfigMap)`: Same logic for ConfigMaps — prevents changing `immutable` back to false and prevents changing `data` or `binaryData`.\n- **`pkg/apis/core/validation/validation_test.go`**: Tests for `TestValidateSecretUpdate` and `TestValidateConfigMapUpdate` covering immutability scenarios.\n- **`pkg/registry/core/secret/strategy.go`**: The REST API strategy for Secrets. Its `ValidateUpdate` method calls `validation.ValidateSecretUpdate`, enforcing immutability at the API server level.\n- **`pkg/registry/core/configmap/strategy.go`**: The REST API strategy for ConfigMaps. Its `ValidateUpdate` method calls `validation.ValidateConfigMapUpdate`, enforcing immutability at the API server level.\n\n## 3. Watch Optimization (Skipping Watches for Immutable Objects)\n\n- **`pkg/kubelet/util/manager/watch_based_manager.go`**: The core watch-based manager implementation. Defines `isImmutableFunc` type and `objectCacheItem` struct with an `immutable bool` field. In the `Get` method (line 343), after fetching an object, it calls `c.isImmutable(object)` — if true, it calls `item.setImmutable()` and `item.stop()` to stop the reflector/watch for that object. The `restartReflectorIfNeeded` method skips restart if `i.immutable` is true. `NewObjectCache` and `NewWatchBasedManager` are the constructors.\n- **`pkg/kubelet/configmap/configmap_manager.go`**: Implements `NewWatchingConfigMapManager` which defines an `isImmutable` closure that checks `configMap.Immutable != nil && *configMap.Immutable`, and passes it to `manager.NewWatchBasedManager`.\n- **`pkg/kubelet/secret/secret_manager.go`**: Implements `NewWatchingSecretManager` which defines an `isImmutable` closure that checks `secret.Immutable != nil && *secret.Immutable`, and passes it to `manager.NewWatchBasedManager`.\n- **`pkg/kubelet/util/manager/watch_based_manager_test.go`**: Unit tests for the watch-based manager, including tests that verify reflectors are stopped for immutable secrets.\n- **`pkg/kubelet/configmap/configmap_manager_test.go`**: Tests for the configmap manager.\n- **`pkg/kubelet/secret/secret_manager_test.go`**: Tests for the secret manager.\n\n## 4. E2E and Integration Tests\n\n- **`test/e2e/common/storage/configmap_volume.go`**: E2E conformance test `should be immutable if 'immutable' field is set` — verifies that once a ConfigMap is marked immutable, data updates are rejected and the immutable flag cannot be cleared.\n- **`test/e2e/common/storage/secrets_volume.go`**: Same conformance test for Secrets.\n- **`test/integration/kubelet/watch_manager_test.go`**: Integration test for the watch manager using `manager.NewObjectCache` with an `isImmutable` function.\n\n## 5. Generated Files\n\n- **`pkg/apis/core/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`**: Auto-generated conversion functions that copy the `Immutable` field between internal and v1 API types for both Secret and ConfigMap.\n- **`pkg/apis/core/zz_generated.deepcopy.go`**: Auto-generated DeepCopy functions that handle the `Immutable *bool` pointer field for internal types.\n- **`staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/zz_generated.deepcopy.go`**: Auto-generated DeepCopy functions for the public v1 API types.\n\n## Call Chain Summary\n\nFor **mutation prevention**: API request → `pkg/registry/core/configmap/strategy.go:ValidateUpdate` → `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go:ValidateConfigMapUpdate` (checks `oldCfg.Immutable` and rejects data changes).\n\nFor **watch optimization**: Kubelet → `pkg/kubelet/configmap/configmap_manager.go:NewWatchingConfigMapManager` (defines `isImmutable` closure) → `pkg/kubelet/util/manager/watch_based_manager.go:NewWatchBasedManager` → `NewObjectCache` → `objectCache.Get` (calls `c.isImmutable(object)` and stops the reflector if true)."
